arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd & Chelsea make Gavi contact; Arsenal rival Liverpool for Zubimendi
arts.sum: Arsenal want to sign a new midfielder to replace Thomas Partey in 2025 and are ready to move for Liverpool target Martin Zubimendi of Real Sociedad. With Virgil van Dijk's future up in the air, Liverpool have drawn up a four-man shortlist of replacements which includes Juventus' Gleison Bremer, Sporting CP's Goncalo Inacio, Sevilla's Loic Bade and Crystal Palace's Marc Guehi .

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes request to Liverpool fans after Steven Gerrard comments come to light
arts.sum: Liverpool were stunned by Nottingham Forest last time out, having previously enjoyed a 100 per cent start to the season, and Arne Slot wants fans to raise the volume for their next game against Bournemouth to lift the players

arts.ttl: Alisson an injury doubt for Bournemouth clash
arts.sum: Alisson Becker is an injury doubt for Liverpool's clash with Bournemouth on Saturday, manager Arne Slot said on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool FC blasted by local councillor in rapidly deleted social media post
arts.sum: Liverpool City Councillor Ellie Byrne hit out at the club after they said they would like to keep a portion of Anfield Road permanently shut outside the famous stadium

arts.ttl: ‘Made it very clear’: What Christian Falk just heard about Liverpool & £125.9m midfielder will intrigue fans
arts.sum: Florian Wirtz is seemingly destined to take the next step of his footballing career in the summer of 2025 having made such ambitions ‘very clear’. Christian Falk now notes that the highly-rated German international won’t go cheaply, however, should he be sold next year. arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool and Spurs scouted the same player in the Champions League this week
arts.sum: Premier League clubs Arsenal, Liverpool and Tottenham are all interested in the same player. They scouted him in the Champions League this week when the player featured for Atalanta against Arsenal. According to TBR Football, several Premier League clubs were present in Bergamo to watch Atalanta winger Ademola Lookman. arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals key Liverpool player is a DOUBT for Saturday's clash with Bournemouth after suffering a hamstring injury
arts.sum: Mail Sport understands the Liverpool star is dealing with hamstring tightness and is now facing a race to be fit in time for Saturday's match against Bournemouth at Anfield.

arts.sum: The teenager moved to the Teesiders on loan from Anfield
